## Topics

### Team Structure and Introductions

  - [Vivek introduced as new managing editor and strategy lead for Prophecy account](https://fathom.video/share/BcrNcxS9r37aV_QkY1y4vnspHjg_E-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

### SEO Performance Expectations

  - [Typical trajectory: groundswell of impressions first, followed by clicks](https://fathom.video/share/BcrNcxS9r37aV_QkY1y4vnspHjg_E-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Clicks often start increasing around 6-week mark](https://fathom.video/share/BcrNcxS9r37aV_QkY1y4vnspHjg_E-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Revenue is ultimate goal, but impressions and clicks are early indicators](https://fathom.video/share/BcrNcxS9r37aV_QkY1y4vnspHjg_E-6v?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
